message:
refactor(tui): Replace MockHit/MockPane with real types in test

Replace inline mock structures with real AgentPane and SearchHit types
in bulk_selection_collect_selected_hits test. Uses existing make_hit
helper for constructing test data.

Closes bd-1c25 (P6.14f: Replace UI/TUI mock data with real indexed
fixtures)

Changes:
- Replace MockHit/MockPane with AgentPane/SearchHit
- Use make_hit() helper for constructing test SearchHits
- Remove transitional allowlist entries for MockHit/MockPane

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
